summary: Tested Admin Declarations Dashboard (AdminDeclarationsPage.jsx). Backend: 11/14 tests passed (3 skipped due to fixture dependencies). Frontend: All critical flows verified - dashboard loads correctly with stats cards, search, filters, declaration table, and detail modal with 4 tabs.

minor.issue: Login endpoint has 5 per minute rate limit which can cause 429 errors during rapid testing

ui_bugs.issue:
HTML nesting warning:
cannot be a descendant of

in StatusBadge component

action_items:
Fix HTML nesting issue in AdminDeclarationsPage.jsx line 1042-1043: StatusBadge (which renders a div) is inside a

tag
critical_code_review_comments: Admin Declarations Dashboard implementation is complete and functional
All 5 stats cards present: Totale, Da Revisionare, In Revisione, Doc. Incompleta, Presentate
Search input with advanced search (nome, cognome, ragione sociale, codice fiscale, email)
Status filter with 7 options: Tutti gli stati, Bozza, Inviata, Doc. Incompleta, In Revisione, Pronta, Presentata, Rifiutata
Year filter with options: Tutti gli anni, 2025, 2024, 2023, 2022, 2021
Declaration table with columns: Cliente, Anno, Stato, Completamento, Documenti, Creata, Aggiornata, Azioni
Detail modal with 4 tabs: Panoramica, Sezioni, Messaggi, Gestione Stato
Message sending with integration request checkbox working
Status change with 7 status buttons working correctly
Toast notifications for status changes working
seed_data_creation: Used existing declaration from previous iteration: TestAutoSave User (2024, Bozza, 7% completion)
context_for_next_testing_agent:
Admin Declarations Dashboard fully tested. Key features: GET /api/declarations/v2/admin/declarations (with search, status, anno filters), GET /api/declarations/v2/admin/stats, PUT /api/declarations/v2/admin/declarations/{id}/status, POST /api/declarations/v2/declarations/{id}/messages. Frontend route: /admin/declarations. Minor HTML nesting issue in Gestione Stato tab (StatusBadge inside

tag).

admin_login.notes: Login with francesco@fiscaltaxcanarie.com works correctly, role=super_admin

admin_declarations_list.notes: GET /api/declarations/v2/admin/declarations returns list with all required fields

admin_stats.notes: GET /api/declarations/v2/admin/stats returns total, by_status, new_submissions, pending_review

search_functionality.notes: Search by name, email, codice fiscale working

status_filter.notes: Filter by status (bozza, inviata, etc.) working

stats_cards_click.notes: Clicking stats cards filters by status

modal_panoramica_tab.notes: Shows ID Pratica, Creata il, Ultima Modifica, Progresso Compilazione

modal_sezioni_tab.notes: Shows all 14 sections with completion status

modal_messaggi_tab.notes: Shows message history, message input, send button, integration request checkbox

modal_gestione_stato_tab.notes: Shows 7 status buttons, current status highlighted, note input
